name: Susannah McCorkle
abstract: Susannah McCorkle (January 1, 1946 – May 19, 2001) was an American jazz singer.

concerts.label: Body and Soul: The Music of Ella Fitzgerald
The New York Pops: The Brazilian Beat
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Al Gafa
about_quotes.evidence: I started working with a lot of singers... Susannah McCorkle... I have like an understanding of lyrics and when I play... singers seem to realize that when I’m working with them.
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Gafa interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 2, 2023
